title: Graphorkis macrobulbon
taxonomy: Graphorkis macrobulbon is a species of orchid. Graphorkis macrobulbon belongs to the genus Graphorkis, which is a part of the subtribe Coelogyneinae. This subtribe is further classified under the tribe Coelogyneae, which is a part of the subfamily Epidendroideae. The Epidendroideae subfamily is a part of the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. Graphorkis macrobulbon's classification is thus: Orchidaceae > Epidendroideae > Coelogyneae > Coelogyneinae > Graphorkis.
